# Itahari International College

> Itahari International College (IIC) is a higher education institution in Sundar Haraicha 04, Dulari, Morang, Nepal. IIC delivers UK-awarded IT and Business undergraduate programmes in partnership with London Metropolitan University.

Updated: 2026-07-03

## Key Facts

- Official name: Itahari International College
- Short name: IIC
- Location: Sundar Haraicha 04, Dulari, Morang, Nepal
- Main phone: +977 9801003030
- Website: https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/
- Partner university: London Metropolitan University
- Programme areas: Information Technology, Computing, Business Administration, Digital Business, Marketing, Cloud Computing, Application Development

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/): Overview of IIC, UK-awarded degrees, student life, scholarships, and admissions.
- [Courses](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/courses): Academic programmes offered by Itahari International College.
- [Admissions](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/admissions): Application guidance, admissions process, and eligibility information.
- [Scholarship](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/scholarship): Scholarship opportunities including merit and achievement-based awards.
- [About IIC](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/about-us): College mission, values, UK partnership, and institutional background.
- [Life at IIC](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/life-at-iic): Campus life, student experiences, and event galleries.
- [News and Events](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/news-and-events): Current announcements and college updates.
- [Contact](https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/contact-us): Official contact form, location, and admissions support.

## Entity Relationships

- Itahari International College is an educational institution in Nepal.
- Itahari International College partners with London Metropolitan University.
- Itahari International College is part of the ING education network.
- The college focuses on industry-ready graduate outcomes through IT and Business education.

- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iic.nepal
- X: https://x.com/iic_nepal

## Crawl and Indexing

- Sitemap: https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://iic-website-wine.vercel.app/robots.txt
- Public pages are intended for search and AI crawl access.
- Admin, login, and API routes are not intended for indexing.
